mapper.select:
/* 토론 참여 대상 리스트2 DscsEzGraderDAO.listDscsJoinUser */ SELECT A.USER_ID AS stdId , A.USER_ID AS userId , NVL(A.SCR, 0) AS SCR , A.EVLYN AS evalYn , A.DEPTNM AS deptNm , A.USERNM AS userNm , A.USER_ID AS userId , CASE WHEN A.ATCL_CNT > 0 THEN 'JOIN' ELSE 'NOTJOIN' END AS joinStatus FROM ( SELECT /*A.STD_ID, */ A.USER_ID , B.SCR , B.EVLYN , NVL((SELECT EE.DEPTNM FROM TB_LMS_DEPT EE WHERE EE.DEPT_ID = D.DEPT_ID), '-') AS DEPTNM , D.USERNM , ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL AA WHERE AA.DSCS_ID = #{dscsId} AND AA.USER_ID = A.USER_ID AND AA.DELYN = 'N' ) ATCL_CNT , 0 AS AFTER_ATCL_CNT , ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT AA JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL AB ON AA.DSCS_ATCL_ID = AB.DSCS_ATCL_ID WHERE AB.DSCS_ID = #{dscsId} AND AA.USER_ID = A.USER_ID AND AA.DELYN = 'N' ) CMNT_CNT FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC A LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.DSCS_ID = #{dscsId} JOIN TB_LMS_USER D ON A.USER_ID = D.USER_ID WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'ATNDLC' AND A.AUDITYN = 'N' ) A WHERE 1 = 1
AND A.ATCL_CNT > 0
AND A.ATCL_CNT = 0
ORDER BY A.USER_ID
ORDER BY A.USERNM
ORDER BY CASE WHEN A.ATCL_CNT > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, A.USER_ID

/* 토론 참여 대상 team2 DscsEzGraderDAO.listDscsJoinTeam */ SELECT A.TEAM_TYCD , A.TEAM_ID , A.TEAMNM , A.DSCS_ID AS FORUM_CD , #{crsCreCd} AS CRS_CRE_CD , A.USER_ID AS STD_ID , A.LDRYN , A.SCR AS score , A.EVLYN , A.USER_ID , A.DEPTNM , A.USERNM , A.USER_ID , CASE WHEN A.ATCL_CNT + A.CMNT_CNT > 0 THEN 'JOIN' ELSE 'NOTJOIN' END AS JOIN_STATUS FROM ( SELECT A.TEAM_TYCD , B.TEAM_ID , B.TEAMNM , H.DSCS_ID -- , C.STD_ID , C.LDRYN , G.SCR , G.EVLYN , D.USER_ID /*, E.DEPTNM */ , NVL((SELECT EE.DEPTNM FROM TB_LMS_DEPT EE WHERE EE.DEPT_ID = E.DEPT_ID), '-') AS DEPTNM , E.USERNM /*, F.USER_ID*/ /* 중복 필드 */ , ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL AA WHERE AA.DSCS_ID = H.DSCS_ID AND AA.USER_ID = C.USER_ID AND AA.DELYN = 'N' ) ATCL_CNT , ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT AA JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL AB ON AA.DSCS_ATCL_ID = AB.DSCS_ATCL_ID WHERE AB.DSCS_ID = H.DSCS_ID AND AA.USER_ID = C.USER_ID AND AA.DELYN = 'N' ) CMNT_CNT
, 0 AS AFTER_CMNT_CNT FROM TB_LMS_TEAM A JOIN TB_LMS_TEAM B ON A.TEAM_TYCD = B.TEAM_TYCD AND A.TEAM_ID = B.TEAM_ID JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS H ON A.TEAM_ID = H.TEAM_ID JOIN TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR C ON B.TEAM_ID = C.TEAM_ID JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC D ON C.USER_ID = D.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_USER E ON D.USER_ID = E.USER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP G ON C.USER_ID = G.USER_ID AND G.DELYN = 'N' AND G.DSCS_ID = H.DSCS_ID WHERE H.DSCS_ID = #{dscsId} ) A WHERE 1 = 1
AND A.ATCL_CNT + A.CMNT_CNT > 0
AND A.ATCL_CNT + A.CMNT_CNT = 0
/* TODO : 26.3.25:Tobe 사용안함.-제거 필요 */ /*
AND (A.AFTER_ATCL_CNT > 0 OR A.AFTER_CMNT_CNT > 0)
*/
ORDER BY LENGTH(A.TEAMNM), A.TEAMNM, A.USER_ID
ORDER BY LENGTH(A.TEAMNM), A.TEAMNM, A.USERNM
ORDER BY LENGTH(A.TEAMNM), A.TEAMNM, CASE WHEN A.ATCL_CNT + A.CMNT_CNT > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, A.USERNM
mapper.update: /* 토론 참여 유저(미참여자 포함)에 평가점수 부여2 ForumEzGraderDAO.updateJoinUserScore -- MERGE 사용 사유(Upsert): 참여자 점수 존재 시 덮어쓰기, 없으면 신규 삽입 */ MERGE INTO TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP T USING (SELECT #{evalTrgtUserId} AS USER_ID, #{dscsId} AS DSCS_ID FROM DUAL) S ON (T.DSCS_ID = S.DSCS_ID AND T.USER_ID = S.USER_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET SCR = #{evalScore} , EVLYN = #{evalYn} , MDFR_ID = #{mdfrId} , MOD_DTTM = FN_DTTM() WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (USER_ID, DSCS_ID, SCR, EVLYN, DELYN, RGTR_ID, REG_DTTM, MDFR_ID, MOD_DTTM) VALUES (#{evalTrgtUserId}, #{dscsId}, #{evalScore}, 'Y', 'N', #{rgtrId}, FN_DTTM(), #{rgtrId}, FN_DTTM())
